rationale: Selected react-vite for frontend and node-express for backend.
Blender MCP requested for cinematic render creation with volumetric lighting.
img2threejs requested for procedural Three.js factory generation from Blender render.
Combined workflow: Blender creates reference render, img2threejs generates interactive code.
Vision capability required for both render feedback loop and sculpt comparison sheets.
Quality budget and latency preference supports multi-stage iteration across both pipelines.
Three.js will be installed in generated workspace, not control plane.
